name: Crab Broccoli Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Plus 2 tablespoons Butter or Oleo
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the crab and set aside.
2. Cook broccoli until almost tender and arrange in the bottom of a greased 1-quart casserole dish.
3. Sprinkle with grated cheese.
4. Melt 1/4 cup Butter and sauté the onion.
5. Add flour, curry powder, and salt.
6. Gradually stir in milk. Cook until thickened.
7. Stir in lemon juice.
8. Add crab to the casserole.
9. Pour over broccoli and cheese in the casserole dish.
10. Mix 2 tablespoons melted butter with bread crumbs and sprinkle over top.
11. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. A good dish to use the krab. Also does nicely in individual casseroles.
